nodes.title: The PM Group’s Full Service Advertising Agency Offerings are the Driving Force Behind Our Client Growth
The PM Group Turns 30: Helping Our Clients Give Back
Nissan of Boerne Honored with Nissan’s Award of Excellence. Again.

pageContext.content:
Nissan of Boerne, a brand new Nissan dealership located in Boerne, Texas, hosted its Grand Opening Gala and ribbon cutting on Thursday, March 5. And The PM Group was right there to celebrate this auspicious opening, as Nissan of Boerne’s new adverting agency.
 
Located at 31805 IH 10 West in Boerne, Texas, this is no small car dealership, it’s the largest Nissan dealership in San Antonio (based on square footage). Housed in this 60,000 square foot mega dealership are 33 state-of-the-art service bays, over 600 new and pre-owned vehicles. It will eventually bring up to 100 new jobs to the area.
 
The dealership, which serves San Antonio and the surrounding communities of New Braunfels, San Marcos, Bandera, Kerrville, Fredericksburg and Hondo, offers complimentary amenities including shuttle service; loaner cars; guest WiFi; refreshments; a very comfortable guest lounge and a fun play area for children. 
 
The broadcast from The PM Group has already hit the airwaves and there is more to come as we shift into high gear.
